Use React with Tailwind CSS for styling. Implement particle-effects for all state changes and interactions. The accordion-layout should prioritize information hierarchy and user task flows. Apply a electric-blue-cyan color scheme with airy-light visual treatment. Include GSAP for animated transitions and micro-interactions. Ensure the design works seamlessly across all device sizes and input methods. Add comprehensive empty states, loading indicators, and error handling
negative_prompt: Skip unnecessary complexity, heavy animations, unclear hierarchy, missing breadcrumbs, and unlabeled icon buttons.
acceptance_criteria: Search functionality must include debounced input and highlighted results
Charts and visualizations must include tooltips and legends
All API calls must include loading, error, and retry states
Undo and redo functionality must be available for destructive actions
All interactive elements must have hover, focus, and active states with smooth transitions
All modals and drawers must trap focus and support escape key closing
